nodes.name: 小美洲鹃
nodes.summary: 小美洲鹃（Coccycua pumila）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dwarf cuckoo。

nodes.name: Dwarf cuckoo
nodes.summary: The dwarf cuckoo (Coccycua pumila) is a tropical American bird species of the cuckoo family (Cuculidae). It was formerly placed in the genus Coccyzus or Micrococcyx. Following the discovery that it belongs to a distinct lineage around the little cuckoo, the genus Coccycua has been reinstated for these. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Panama, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, and heavily degraded former forest. References

nodes.name: 小棕鹃属
nodes.summary: 小棕鹃属（Coccycua）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Little cuckoo、Dwarf cuckoo、Ash-colored cuckoo。
